name: D-Terminal
effect: As a Free Action, check the D-Terminal to identify which Digi-Eggs in your possession are compatible with your partner's current form. As a Basic Action, interface with Digital World data structures within reach. Grants +2 to all Archive skill rolls when used to look up Digimon data. Cannot be used for Jack In or Decode checks.
notes: Reference device only — no Jack In or Decode. Free Action: check Digi-Egg compatibility.
